greet.text: Ratz works the bar with his pink prosthetic arm, the servos whining. His steel teeth catch the neon. "So. The artiste wakes. You still owe me for the spaghetti, friend."

deck.text: "Shin came by while you slept. He didn't want to wake the great man." Ratz grins. "He still has your deck down at his shop. Go and see him."

news.text: "One of Lonny Zone's girls was asking after you. And the Health Department keeps threatening to shut me down." He shrugs the whole prosthetic. "Same Chiba, different night."

bye.text: Ratz grunts and goes back to wiping the bar. "Fear is your friend, artiste. Now get out of my light."
